notes.note: The urban praetor's standing duty: hearing private suits in the city. Cases that arose on provincial soil, or between Romans and provincials, were routinely remanded to the proconsul of the relevant province --- here the debt is sent on to Cisalpine Gaul.
A libertus: a manumitted slave still bound by ties of loyalty and service to his former master. Strabo's freedman has been sent ahead to act as his agent in recovering the debt.
